scenes.title: Welcome to Plant Land
scenes.narration: Welcome explorer! Today we are entering the magical world of plants.

dialogue.speaker: Tara
dialogue.text: Are you ready to explore Plant Land with me?

scenes.title: Meet Buddi
scenes.narration: Meet Buddi, a tiny seed with a big dream. Buddi wants to become a strong and healthy tree.

dialogue.speaker: Buddi
dialogue.text: Hello! I am Buddi. Can you help me become a giant tree?

scenes.title: Inside a Seed
scenes.narration: A seed contains a baby plant called an embryo. It also stores food to help the baby plant grow.

hotspots.name: Cotyledon
hotspots.description: Stores food for the baby plant.

scenes.title: Germination Lab
scenes.narration: Seeds need water, air and warmth to germinate.

scenes.title: Seed Dispersal Adventure
scenes.narration: Seeds travel to new places in different ways.

scenes.title: Farmer Simulator
scenes.narration: Let's learn how crops are grown.

scenes.title: Final Challenge
scenes.narration: Let's see how much you have learned.
